subject: affs: fix a memory leak in affs_remount

features.path_conditions: After successful kstrdup, every return path (including error returns from parse_options and the normal exit paths) must call kfree on the duplicated buffer.
features.fit_test_reasoning: kstrdup acquires heap memory whose lifetime must be explicitly released; kfree is the matching release; missing kfree on any return path is a memory leak; this follows classic acquire/use/release semantics, so the four-features pattern applies.
